sections.paragraph:
verb לפנות (>>לִפְנוֹת)

to turn; approach; appeal to, apply; refer to, speak to

verb להיפנות

to find time, be free; be vacant; ease oneself; turn, turn away; be removed

verb פונה

be cleared; evacuated, vacated; available

verb להתפנות

be evacuated, be vacant; to find time, take time off; be cleared away, removed; excrete, evacuate (one's bowels)

verb להפנות

to refer to; turn; turn over; change direction; deviate

verb הופנה

be directed; referred to; turned to

preposition

lest

masculine noun

side, facet; characteristic
